findings.message: The in ItemBanner is missing an alt attribute, leaving the image without an accessible name. Screen readers will not be able to describe the image content, violating WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1 (Non-text Content).
findings.suggestion: Add an alt attribute describing the image, e.g. . If the image is purely decorative, use alt="" so assistive tech can skip it.
